items.lore: Forged in direct tribute to the earth and its aspects, these ornately-crafted boots are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Gaea-Hewn Boots

items.lore: Despite the absence of natural light, in the deepest reaches of the Void grows foliage and flora capable of sustaining itself by absorbing latent energy. Such an accomplishment is to be admired, ideally from a keen distance.
items.name: Etiolation

items.lore: Orders, cannonfire, calls for surrender—the wind carries all. To ride the winds is to harness the lifeblood of battle, infiltrating up the veins of command with mere token resistance.
items.name: Windborne

items.lore: The strong can hammer foe and nature alike into submission, waging war with indiscriminate force. The truly powerful pit them against each other on a whim, weaving stone and verdure into an elaborate web of attrition that beats with the heart of an entire world. What is an enemy compared to all the might of the Earth?
items.name: Mazeweaver

majorIds.Intangible: +Intangible: The knockback you take is drastically reduced, and reflected damage deals large knockback.

items.lore: It permeates around you, so subtly, enveloping your very being with a shroud on the cusp of impalpability.  Nothing can affect you now - the incorporeal hiding in plain sight.
items.name: Dark Matter֎

majorIds.Superconductor: +Superconductor: Chain Lightning channels three massive lightning bolts through you, arcing to enemies within 8 blocks for 225% and stunning them for 1s. You take 10% more damage for 4s.

items.lore: To wear the mark is more than a show of allegiance. It is a willingness to channel the might of the gods at whatever cost, as the fate of the battle is worth more than surviving to see its end.
items.name: Insignia

items.lore: Steeped in the deepest energies of the Ahms region void, these ornately-crafted leggings are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Abyss-Imbued Leggings

items.lore: Only the naive celebrate a ceasefire. Not a second wasted, a merciless arms race against the inevitability of war has left you ready to unleash hell the moment the armistice breaks.
items.name: Antebellum

items.internalName: Esteemed Bronze Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This decorative mask, crafted of bronze alloys, is awarded only to those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge.
items.name: Esteemed Bronze Mask of Legendary Victory

items.lore: The oddly uncomfortable helmet was hand sculpted from a mystic clay found only in the depths of Molten Heights. Not much is known about the substance.
items.name: Pisces

majorIds.Expunge: +Expunge: When using Heal, cast one instant pulse that heals 15% of your max health.

items.lore: During a spiritual journey to Kato temple, the sage Capian was presented with powerful spiritual boots with the intention to be used for peaceful magic, and not hard combat.
items.name: Capricorn

majorIds.Plague: +Plague: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

items.lore: "Crystalline towers and stark white horizons. The sharpest frost shards and the softest snowfall. Before the permafrost monarch of winter, lay your heart down: become the right hand of the cold."
items.name: Frozen Devotion

items.lore: Something is lurking—it must be, in the eerie silence that leaves you so utterly alone. And these remains… Are they a reminder of one who didn’t stay quiet, or does what lurks in the unknown already know you’re here?
items.name: Doomsday Omen

items.lore: A once-great hero left behind these sturdy, reliable greaves, trusting those after her to be able to use their power to protect others, should they don them. Her courage fuels their wearers.
items.name: Vaward

majorIds.Altruism: +Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

items.lore: Childhood memories, days of late nights and snow fights and cocoa by the fireside. Loving smiles and friendly faces. The beating heart of the world: home. This is what you fight for, beating back those dark and wicked forces which work to break down all that is loved. There is no sacrifice too great for the hearth.
items.name: Hearthkeeper

items.lore: Crudely misshapen greaves made from haphazard scrap found about the Starfield. You sense a foreboding notion that donning such a thing would be the end of sensing anything at all.
items.name: Titanium Grievers

items.lore: Those whose souls are lost to the Canyon of the Lost eternally seek form. They inhabit those who wear these boots, unknowingly dragging the soul of the wearer into their ranks if worn for too long, leaving a wandering husk.
items.name: Revenant

items.lore: This dark relic was found at the very bottom of the deepest trench of the ocean. It drains all light surrounding it, blinding everything in a strange abyssal darkness.
items.name: Aphotic

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Petrichor

items.lore: 450 years ago a demonic plague like no other spread through Gavel, killing thousands. That is, until a priest encased the disease inside a helmet and warned everyone never to wear it.
items.name: Necrosis

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] Forged from the storm-touched ether, this chest piece calls its wearer to rise above the sky. With every step, the pull of the earth weakens. Jump, and for a moment, you are weightless—caught between the clouds and the stars. Leap, and the heavens may answer.
items.name: Stratosphere

items.lore: Sheer strength exudes from these Orcish relics, simple sandals ill-fitting to humans or Villagers. Enchanted with power and rage rather than magic, the strength that is provided when they are worn is unparalleled.
items.name: Warchief

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] The make of this massive cloak is unlike anything seen before among the provinces. Foreign images shift and melt in ethereal projections within the inside.
items.name: Hetusol

items.lore: Echoes of the Fracturing persist in the Sky at scales unimaginable, implying a power so all-encompassing it leaves you in awe.
items.name: Sweeping Majesty

majorIds.Windsurf: +Windsurf: Righting Reflex has 75% reduced fall speed, lasts twice as long, and is affected stronger by movement speed.

items.lore: A tag on the inside of the hat reads: "Do not fly during thunderstorms! The wearer is liable for all injuries sustained while using this product."
items.name: Propeller Hat

items.lore: These common leather boots were once owned by a barbarian with no magical prowess. Instead of enchanting it, he coated the soles in corrupted shards to punish those who opposed him.
items.name: Virgo

items.lore: These hollowed spikes still hold the lingering embers of the event that formed this caldera long ago, lending an almost unnatural glow. It's a comforting warmth, though the force of the eruption remains dormant, primed for the slightest push.
items.name: Scorched Antiquity

items.lore: An eerie glimpse into what once was, shining beautifully in the infinite expanse of the Void. As tragic a tale it is, perhaps it is better left a wisp.
items.name: Ghostly Quasar

majorIds.Alter Ego: +Alter Ego: Awakened can be activated after saving 40% less mana, but its duration is reduced by 25%.

items.lore: Wybels have a strange attraction to cosmic magic, and many an owner will find them staring through the window at night. One, however, claims to have seen her Wybel making something out of white stardust. The abode was robbed shortly after, and the supposed item gone missing without confirmation of its existence.
items.name: Stardew

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] In the marbling of wood grain. Drying moisture in the cobbles. Clumps of flowers. Tree bark, birth marks, the pattern of this plate - unflinching faces trapped, now revealed. The question pierces your mind: what shape will I be hewn into, one day?
items.name: Blank Stare

majorIds.Dead Weight: +Dead Weight: Totem's horizontal velocity is greatly increased at the cost of vertical movement.

items.lore: A pair of glowing sabatons crafted from time-lost relics. Somehow, despite just creating them, you get the feeling that you've worn these before...
items.name: Ephemeris

items.lore: Many prophecies foretell of new eras. Most are fabricated or proven false in time. One passed through the Dogun caverns, however, tells of a dawn soon to break, in which the earth shall run red and return to flame. Fanatical sects whisper the coming of a new demonic god.
items.name: Dawnbreak

items.lore: The hide of the Touroto, an almost invincible Bull-like creature, is said to be pierced only by the horn of the Touroto itself, making it extremely valuable.
items.name: Taurus

majorIds.Perilous Flare: +Perilous Flare: Pyrokinesis moves much slower, but has an increased Area of Effect and  +50%.

items.lore:
"Discernable by it's one-second glow, the cypress firefly makes it home amidst the ash of the upper heights, blending in with the fiery landscape."
 -Delinaed's Guide to Local Species, 2nd Edition.
items.name: Cypress Amber

items.lore: Able to withstand the grasp of claws of pure steel, the perch of the Minokawa thrums with the might of a beast that can devour the sun. Given free reign of the skies, even the brightest of stars are no match.
items.name: Perch of the Shrouded Sun

items.lore: The gods of air and thunder, frustrated with being physically insubstantial alone, decided to band together to forge the ultimate leggings of defense.
items.name: Gemini

items.lore: Radioactive emissions caused by starfall seeps into the mind, the atoms, the Soul. Transfiguring organic matter into something new, something sinister. It's only through sheer force of will that victims of such a thing break free from themselves, and their imperfect vessels... into something beautiful.
items.name: Radiation

items.lore: Abandoned by the dwarven Ramriders in their heyday, this hefty armor forged to protect a steed sees little use but littering the steppes of the upper heights. A memento of a slaughter, in days long past.
items.name: Eradian Cuissards

items.lore: Despite being thin enough to blow away in the wind, this mineral-blended shawl holds the force of a supervolcano within its soft fabric.
items.name: Shawl of Gaea

items.lore: “The symbol of the river” is a name that is often synonymous with this garment, with many water like qualities surrounding it, heavily bathed in magical meaning.
items.name: Aquarius

majorIds.Phoenix-Born: +Phoenix-Born: Health Regeneration is increased by 0.75% for every 1% Health missing.

items.lore: From the ashes, let a hero rise anew.
items.name: Firebird

items.lore: Forged directly from the bloody red stone mined from the Nether, they were locked away for fear of inciting insanity in those who wore them.
items.name: Nether's Scar

items.lore: For the belief of the cosmos’ defilement, the moon was noted to remain unchanged. Those with this belief live only for the light of the moon, desperately seeking to maintain it through means that would only darken the soul of the most devout. Such from them comes the word lunacy.
items.name: Moontower

majorIds.Sorcery: +Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] You only have limited time. But what if, you could experience that time again? And again, and again...
items.name: Time Rift

items.lore: In the shadow of the Sun, a storm of unmistakable hatred follows. One which, however ephemeral, may only yield to the great pyres like these in the minutes it has to spare.
items.name: Pulse Storm

items.lore: The hide of the centaur is extraordinarily magical in the right hands. It is told to allow the user to gain the swiftness of the horse, but also leaves them vulnerable to hard hitting attacks.
items.name: Sagittarius

majorIds.Hawkeye: +Hawkeye: Arrow Hurricane becomes a condensed stream of 25 arrows, dealing 33%, 4%, and 4% each.

items.lore: Many artifacts are found to incite rage in the wearer, and wizards old and new alike conjecture as to the purpose of them. Very few increase the latent abilities of the wearers to ensure havoc, and none to such a degree as these boots.
items.name: Slayer

items.lore: Sculpted by searing flames and dazzling light, in the years since the Fracturing the Greatbirds' nest has developed a blinding glow. It has both immense power and volatility, yet seems to hold a hidden strength for one who can tame its spirit.
items.name: Greatbird Eyrie

items.lore: The last known crafts of Theorick before his fall in battle were pieces of armour crafted out of pure ice, all of which have melted save for these shimmering boots. The coldest gales and most suffocating heat nurture and repair the wearer instead of being stifling or deadly.
items.name: Boreal

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: +Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

items.lore: Every ounce of your suffering must be made worth it. Otherwise, what was the point of it all?
items.name: Pain Cycle

items.lore: This thick skinned jacket, imbued with the courage of a thousand lion hearts, will grant the user massive protection from all who target them.
items.name: Leo

items.lore: A wolf and a rabbit met in the woods. The rabbit was injured; the wolf spared it. The two grew close. One day, the rabbit fell into a hunter's trap. It was terrified, surrounded by armed men. The wolf burst from the trees, fighting the men back, even as they shot it with their bows, long enough for the rabbit to run away. It never saw the wolf again.
items.name: Protector's Parable

items.lore: Two iron horns adorn this helmet to enhance the warriors of the Eradian, Dwarves who specifically rode Rams into battle at incredible speed.
items.name: Aries

majorIds.Cavalryman: +Cavalryman: You may cast spells and attack with a -30% damage penalty while on a horse.

items.lore: All those who wear these enchanted boots deposit a single fond memory into them. They are forgotten forever, but wearing them recalls every memory within vividly.
items.name: Memento

items.lore: Forged with the raw powers of both the earth and the sea, these boots were initially an attempt at creating a method of foot-travel over the seas. Despite the spectacular failure of that application, they remain a formidable and reliable set of armor.
items.name: Galleon

items.lore: Life itself is not a flexible material to work with—building sentience is precisely like squeezing blood from a stone. It may be years of toil, but the strength of an entire race that looks to you as a creator cannot be overstated.
items.name: Abiogenesis

majorIds.Sublimation: +Sublimation: Totemic Shatter heals 75% of Regeneration's usual amount at the cost of 2 blocks of radius.

majorIds.Soul Eater: +Soul Eater: Devour and Harvester grant double mana. Decreases maximum marks by 1.

items.lore: Before the invention of magical weight detectors, there was a giant pair of public scales in Cinfras. Instead of being thrown away, they were reforged to be a formidable piece of armour.
items.name: Libra

items.lore: Perennial, in a sense—these plants cycle through a unique bloom for every season. When they fully form, the breathtaking equinox is said to shine with an otherworldly light.
items.name: Equinox Blossom

items.lore: An antique passed from the Caritat wreckage into the hands of the outcast elves of Efilim. So to honor the memory of the selfless family as inspired their self-imposed exile, their strongest healing spells were imbued into it, and sent to those who needed them most.
items.name: Resurgence

items.lore: ...As the heart fails, adrenaline pumps through the body in an attempt to provide energy and keep the victim alive, but medical action must be taken to ensure survival. -Excerpt from Aldorei Medical Tomes, Vol. 6
items.name: Cardiac Arrest

majorIds.Explosive Impact: +Explosive Impact: Exploding gives an additional chance to deal 300% Main Attack damage in a radius of 5 blocks upon killing an enemy.

majorIds.Transcendence: +Transcendence: 25% chance for spells to cost no mana when casted.

items.lore: This patchwork of shells from the Corkian Astrochelys makes for quite the statement sweater; it keeps your neck warm and besides, your foes' fashion fancies feel frivolous, anyway.
items.name: Quilted Carapace

majorIds.Reckless Abandon: +Reckless Abandon: Sacrifice War Scream's defense bonus to give Tempest +5%, +15%, 5% and 3 extra hits.

items.lore: The carapace of the common Maexi pet fire scarabs, while alone, only cause minor burns to the touch. However, when woven together, they produce a variety of cumulative effects.
items.name: Scorpio

items.lore: A condition of severely deficient supply of oxygen to the body that arises from abnormal breathing; practitioners that abuse specific magic combos are often found incapacitated by said condition.
items.name: Asphyxia

items.lore: One of the very few physically-powerful artifacts of the Villagers, these boots were used in the initial crusades against the Green-skins, to overpower the Orcs via raw physical might. Though effective, they have not seen use in a long time.
items.name: Crusade Sabatons

items.lore: The Phoenix Prince is a mythical figure spoken of in Avos legend. His crown cursed him in an endless cycle of death and rebirth.
items.name: Phoenix Prince's Crown

items.lore: “Death claims your soul...”
items.name: Untimely Demise

majorIds.Hurricane's Eye: +Hurricane's Eye: Violent Vortex applies 2 marks to every enemy it hits.

majorIds.Geocentrism: +Geocentrism: Aura radiates from you instead of your Totem and can be cast any time.

items.lore: Forged from mystic, previously unknown metals revealed in the deepest dwarven mining site to date, these sleek, glowing greaves are believed to be utterly indestructible.
items.name: Greaves of the Veneer

items.lore: Wealth and riches...but at what cost?
items.name: Discoverer

majorIds.Sorcery: +Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

majorIds.Escape Route: +Escape Route: Frenzy and Time Dilation charge twice as fast but also decay twice as fast.

items.lore: The Bantisu monks have developed this enigmatic sigil in their years of meditation and study. It blesses the wearer with luck and powerful psionic ability.
items.name: Third Eye

items.lore: Nothing more.
items.name: Cessation

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] The old facemasks of the Eradian guards were forged from raw magma, and enchanted to remain searingly hot, so as to brand the wearer eternally with the mark of Rodoroc's elite.
items.name: Grillface

items.lore: Tisaun, a warrior tasked to fend off a corrupted siege alone, could find only a thin shirt and rusted spear to use before the attack. He defeated all 1000 enemies without taking a scratch, and his bravery infused his gear with that same strength.
items.name: Tisaun's Valor

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] This battered stone mask is of unknown origin, and has no openings for the eyes whatsoever. Indeed, all that can be seen while wearing it is that which makes you truly angry.
items.name: Outrage

majorIds.Freerunner: +Freerunner: When your sprint bar is under 30% full, increase your sprint speed by +150%.

majorIds.Lightweight: +Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: A rogue inventor stole the plans for a steam jet booster from Corkus and reverse engineered them onto a set of boots. While effective, they are dangerous, prone to catastrophic failure.
items.name: Steamjet Walkers

majorIds.Altruism: +Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

majorIds.Lunge: +Lunge: Hop and Leap's horizontal velocity is greatly increased.

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Albedo

majorIds.Taunt: +Taunt: Provoke's Cooldown is lowered by -3s.

majorIds.Sorcery: +Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

items.lore: You know better than anyone else that there’s always a sliver of truth behind the tallest of tales.
items.name: Runebound Chains

items.lore: Donning this helmet sears your mind with images of a world on fire. These blistering thoughts pressure you to make that world a reality.
items.name: Conflagrate

majorIds.Rock Shield: +Rock Shield: Arrow Shield's defense is increased by 10%, but its number of charges is reduced by 1.

items.lore: Sometimes it takes a heart of stone to do what must be done.
items.name: Granitic Mettle

items.lore: The Wanderer; the Betrayer; the Lunatic.
items.name: Valse Vaincue

items.lore: A marvel of Corkus' electromagical advancements, this high-tech chestplate is equipped with steam jets to boost the user's speed, at a minimal cost to protection.
items.name: Booster Plate

majorIds.Temblor: +Temblor: Bash gains +1 Area of Effect and is 0.05s faster.

items.lore: The last step towards purity. Dissolve and coagulate. Be anew.
items.name: Iosis

items.lore: This suit was clearly designed by the hand of a mechanic, though its purpose is unknown. There are quite a lot of buttons on it though, so let’s press this one!
items.name: Gadgeteer

items.lore: Wearing this deceptively simple shroud causes the user to fade into the shadows, sometimes flickering out of existence for a moment.
items.name: Dark Shroud

items.lore: This matted tangle of vines and marshland plants contains various herbal remedies woven into it. It is oddly comfortable, despite the thorns coating the inside.
items.name: Fenmask

items.lore: The harmony of the elements, a world which sings its truth for all who dare listen, words spoken which can be felt but never known. The Sanctuary, in its whole.
items.name: Rainbow Sanctuary

items.lore: The home of the storms, where the cramped clouds crackle and power surges in sharp bolts.
items.name: Thunder Sanctuary

items.lore: The house of the flames, where the sky runs red with rage and passion burns through every soul.
items.name: Fire Sanctuary

items.lore: The depths of the seas, where the waves flow fierce and fast and wash away the agonies of the world.
items.name: Water Sanctuary

items.lore: True to their promise, these goggles were left as a memento for Ohms when his lover Gale finally died. Light as air, Gale's carefree nature lends itself to those who don them.
items.name: Gale's Sight

majorIds.Saviour's Sacrifice: +Saviour's Sacrifice: While under 50% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

items.lore: The last stand, a hero's rally, a turning tide—is it a tale of a champion who conquered, or a martyr who inspired? This is your story to tell.
items.name: Eleventh Hour

majorIds.Pounce: +Pounce: Escape becomes a forward lunge.

items.lore: In sleep we are unfettered, unhindered by the choices we make. In dream we are unbound, set free to the limits of imagination.
items.name: Traumerei

items.lore: The expanse of the skies, where the wind whistles a warbling anthem and the air extends onward forever.
items.name: Air Sanctuary

items.lore: The heart of the earth, where the ground blooms beautiful blossoms and life grows untethered.
items.name: Earth Sanctuary

items.lore: Fashioned from the cut tails of the now extinct Venti, these nearly immaterial boots are light as air and crackle with lightning.
items.name: Ventus Tail

majorIds.Divine Honor: +Divine Honor: Increases the bonus from Radiance by 10%. Bash deals -15% per hit.

items.lore: Smooth yet unassuming, this hollowed piece feels as if it lay untouched for millennia as the chaos that formed eastern Gavel unfolded around it. No blemish nor order, just nature preserved in its most perfect form.
items.name: Pristine Antiquity

majorIds.Cherry Bombs: +Cherry Bombs: Turns Smoke Bomb into firecrackers that fly farther, tighter, and deal 100%, 30%, 30%, and 30% instantly.

items.lore: No reign lasts forever. Not while your schemes remain unnoticed.
items.name: Conspirator's Trickpockets

items.lore: Andesite is a stone commonly used for weapons and construction, but tends to be ineffective as armor when impure. This sturdy chestplate, however, is testament to the strength of pure andesite.
items.name: Andesite Aegis

majorIds.Entropy: +Entropy: Meteor's speed is increased by 50%.

majorIds.Plague: +Plague: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] A silhouette of forgotten strength, its essence lingering like a half remembered dream. It no longer boasts the sharpness it once had, yet the stories etched into its very being refuse to fade.
items.name: Obsolescent Panoply

items.lore: These leggings are the last remaining piece of a historical set of armor, created with such power as to be thought impossible long ago.
items.name: Post-Ultima

items.lore: All legends must one day fall, but their legacy shall be remembered forevermore.  These memories exist in the hearts of all,  and pave the path forward in hopes to create a world where all may find peace,  however rocky that path may be.
items.name: Babel

items.lore: Taken from the Archwraith by a pious Shaman, this chestplate was immediately abandoned. Its few users since have turned to an all-consuming desire to seek out and realign the last vestiges of purity remaining in the Kander Forest.
items.name: Soul Ink

items.lore: While only a mockery of the original product, this line of helmets became wildly popular before legal disputes and safety concerns halted production.
items.name: The Forgery

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Puppeteer

majorIds.Gentle Glow: +Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores up to 25% more max health to allies, but heals at a slower rate. Fluid Healing's effectiveness is increased by 150%.

majorIds.Lightweight: +Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: A brilliant relic supposedly originating from the Realm of Light, the creators of these strangely shaped boots are completely unknown.
items.name: Passus Lux

majorIds.Mangle: +Mangle: Lacerate will deal +1 slash.

items.lore: An imperfect fit, but you can make a better one.
items.name: Disfigured Vessel

majorIds.Rusted Ichor: +Rusted Ichor: Boiling Blood cooldown is reduced by 0.5s and inflicts 40% slowness, but deals no damage.

items.lore: Ancient and new hearts beat as one.
items.name: Reliquiae

items.lore: “I have hope in me the likes of which you could never imagine, and despair the likes of which you shall never fathom. If I cannot satisfy the one, then I will indulge the other.”
items.name: The Siren's Call

majorIds.Rally: +Rally: Cleansing Breeze heals you for 15% and allies for 20%, but Charge becomes harmless.

items.lore: If the depths of hell allows you this, is staying human an equal trade or a fool's choice?
items.name: Infernal Impulse

requirements.quest: Realm of Light IV - Finding the Light

items.lore: Ancient magicks are required to make these brilliant glasses, imbued with charity and selflessness. They allow sight beyond sight, rumoured to allow sight of a brilliant realm.
items.name: Clearsight Spectacles

majorIds.Alter Ego: +Alter Ego: Awakened can be activated after saving 40% less mana, but its duration is reduced by 25%.

items.lore: Memories take on lives of their own, left long enough.
items.name: Phantasmal Remnants

items.lore: Imbued with the blood of the first werewolf, it was kept in Gelibord as a trophy before being stolen. Wearing it is said to mimic the effects of the lycanthropic curse.
items.name: Blood Moon

items.lore: Adamantite is a soft metal often added to exotic medicine to increase one's health, but a revolutionary blacksmith on Black Road, created a chestplate with an Adamantite alloy, which is advertised to bolster the users endurance.
items.name: Adamantite

majorIds.Paragon: +Paragon: Shield Strike deals 600% damage. Mantle of the Bovemist's cooldown is reduced by 15s, but is limited to one shield charge.

items.lore: Just because it's been said to death doesn't mean it isn't true.
items.name: Aphorism

majorIds.Greed: +Greed: Picking up emeralds heals you and nearby players for 8% max health.

items.lore: Jingle jangle, while shaking your bells. Jingle jangle come the pockets of cash... Catch the trickster, send them to hell," their money is gone and off you've dashed!
items.name: The Jingling Jester

items.lore: Forged on Mage Island, the sparkling liquid-like armour is as hard as obsidian, but light and fluid as water. It glistens with the magic of the ocean winds.
items.name: Crystal

majorIds.Plague: +Plague: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

items.lore: The beauty of this peculiar grotto takes your breath away. Unfortunately, its spores do too...
items.name: Stifling Spores

items.lore: The Blue Mask's physical traits are equal to that of paper, but the mystical properties enhance the wearers personal skills tenfold. The mask is thought to originate from an ancient Dernel tribe.
items.name: Blue Mask

items.lore: Although these boots are crafted from corrupted stone, they do not exhibit any corruptive effects on their wearers. Speculation abounds as to the reason.
items.name: Stalagmites

items.lore: These boots were standard issue to members of the prestigious, and now disbanded, Sodeta Guild, and given as a gift to the owners of Delnar Mansion one day.
items.name: Sodeta Boots

majorIds.Flashfreeze: +Flashfreeze: Ice Snake travels instantly.

items.lore: Do you think you can survive with a sky choked by snow and ash? More importantly, do you think anything else can?
items.name: Impact Winter

majorIds.Brachiate: +Brachiate: Grappling Hook has 25% increased range and increased velocity.

items.lore: King of the Jungle—it's a title reserved for the apex of the apex, and yet from where you swing across the canopy, this beast of supposed royalty is but another victim of your thievish pursuits.
items.name: Jungle Rogue

items.lore: The dark spectres of the decayed forests have created an insidious helmet to drain the spirit of those who wear it, and become servants to their dark whims. Many have fallen to its allure.
items.name: Spectre

items.lore: Salvaged from the limbs of the Vulcor Adrenophage, they radiate extreme heat,  suffusing the body they attach to with that same heat. It almost feels as though your blood is heating to a frenetic boil.
items.name: Phage Pins

requirements.quest: Realm of Light III - A Headless History

items.lore: Used by the Temple of the Legends' strongest guard, the shielded plating is enchanted with a powerful ward to stave off the effects of the corruption.
items.name: Kelight's Shield

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Augoeides

items.lore: Cosmic energy permeates this deceptively dull-looking chestplate, having been crafted with stardust from a comet that only passes over Wynn every 1000 years.
items.name: Millennium

items.lore: The cost of survival is immense, with morale running thin and supply lines choked, feeding the strength of an army condensed to a single point, of a people desperate not to give an inch.
items.name: Stronghold

items.lore: Rumored to be crafted from a Dernic stone, these sinister boots radiate extremely powerful dark energy. They have absorbed the power of the raging seas in their time locked in Sarnfic.
items.name: Abysso Galoshes

items.lore: The runic message carved on these enigmatic boots cover hundreds of different languages, many of them disused, but what has been translated seems to describe a disaster soon to arrive to the world.
items.name: Bad Wolf

majorIds.Meteor Crash: +Meteor Crash: Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals double the damage, but lasts half as long.

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Antimony

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Masochist

items.lore: Spurred on by a drunken bet, the great Thanos smith Kratke improved a pair of leggings from a rival that were once thought to be perfection.
items.name: Kratke

items.lore: The ancient bones of the demon Garaheth are stronger than steel. They clamp down when worn to constrict the bearer, inciting a slow madness.
items.name: Cage of Bones

items.lore: Originating from the unspeakable dark land, looking into the helmet will show nothing but darkness. Wearing it is said to reverse your morality, as if it were draining your will to live into the void.
items.name: Call of the Void

items.lore:
Death is naught but an inconvenience for the strongest of the corrupted. With time, the weight of destruction will pass, and the fires of War will rise anew from within.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Isostatic Rebound

majorIds.Temblor: +Temblor: Bash gains +1 Area of Effect and is 0.05s faster.

items.lore:
The scorching heat, the shifting bodies, the screeching cries of anguish... they're all the least of your problems now.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Molten Fleshmass

items.lore: The armor worn by the enigmatic Matryoshka Idol. It appears to have a nearly uncountably high number of inlets and sockets set inside.
items.name: Matryoshka Shell

majorIds.Fright or Flight: +Fright or Flight: Plays spooky tunes.

majorIds.Entropy: +Entropy: Meteor's speed is increased by 50%.

items.lore:
It always returns a little weaker than what it was before. Perhaps someday, it'll be put down for good.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Crumbling Foundation

items.lore:
Found on the mangled body of a famous Tromsian general fallen to a corrupted siege some time ago, these boots allow the wearer to remain calm and steadfast in the face of overwhelming odds.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Repose

items.lore: This ancient Elven sacrificial mask contains only a sliver of its previous magic, yet the blessing of the Elven god Entia still greatly empowers those who don it.
items.name: Venison

majorIds.Explosive Impact: +Explosive Impact: Exploding gives an additional chance to deal 300% Main Attack damage in a radius of 5 blocks upon killing an enemy.

items.lore: You're seeing red... Time to see more of it.
items.name: Scarlet Veil

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Jinxed Coif

items.lore: These ancient, spark-coursing greaves are all that remains of the great thunder mage Ohms' favorite golem familiar after a dark force turned it against its masters.
items.name: Ohms' Rage

majorIds.Combo Stomp: +Combo Stomp: Landing directly on an enemy with Fierce Stomp sends you back into the air and resets Escape.

items.lore: These are congealed and rather gross, but they leave you with an undeniable bounce in your step.
items.name: Buoyant Balmorals

items.lore: Despite being a much smaller settlement compared to the mighty citadel of Rodoroc, the dwarven smiths of Thanos still can forge mighty products, such as these heavy diamond-alloy boots.
items.name: Anchoryl

items.lore: These leggings hold the interest of many researching the corruption, as they are the only documented case of a non-corrupt fusion of dark and light energy, made of pure twilight.
items.name: Bridge of the Divide

items.lore:
Tiny spikes lining the inside of these boots suppress the grey matter in the wearer's brain, enhancing their capabilities and making them capable of murderous and immoral acts while in this trance-like, numbed state.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Empathy Purge

items.lore: "I know the Beast may return one day...but these chains shall bind it for eternity." The inscription glows bright in the darkness.
items.name: Marius' Prison

items.lore: One of the few remaining standard issue mails that were used against the first hordes to emerge from the infamous portal over 1000 years ago.
items.name: Ragni's Mail

items.lore: Torn scraps of metal line the inside of these boots. They provide no protection, instead forcing a constant adrenaline rush while worn.
items.name: Broken Balance

items.lore: It bears the visage of a great hero. Thank you for participating in the Festival of the Heroes!
items.name: Hero's Mask

items.lore: Once cursed by a druid who had his grove chopped away by a greedy Villager, it was then purified and mass-produced for sale as armor, to the druid's utter disappointment.
items.name: Sawdust

items.lore: There have been many attempts to create a reliable power system in Llevigar, and this plasma-charged helmet was reforged from a notable prototype.
items.name: Shinespark

items.lore:
An otherwise healthy soldier once writhed and collapsed in the confines of an outpost. His autopsy was quickly canceled when military doctors noticed an unusually rapid spread of corruption in his corpse.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Brainbleed

items.lore: Each level deeper into the ocean only harbors stranger and more eerie creatures than before. Though their alien nature is disquieting, it is the way the trend sees no end that worries you the most.
items.name: Megalophobia

items.lore:
For some, the psychological impact of the undead incursions becomes too much to bear. They leave their lives behind hoping to find solace, only to return as an undead themselves.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Woebegone

items.lore: This battered chestplate was once worn by the legendary Wynnic protector, Bob, during the fearsome corrupted sieges before he gave it away to an old friend. An air of melancholy hangs over it.
items.name: Bob's Battle Chestplate

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Bloodied Wreath

items.lore: One of the master tinkerer Cerid's greatest inventions, these odd gear-laced boots clink and chime with the sound of clockworks keeping its powerful magic dynamos constantly running.
items.name: Cerid's Ingenuity

items.lore:
Only the strongest are able to survive Nesaak's unforgivingly harsh conditions. From the frigid temperatures to the vicious wildlife and grotesque corrupteds, life here can feel like challenge after challenge.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Inclemency

majorIds.Lightweight: +Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: Bending the fabric of reality to allow the wearer to take massive strides, these boots are rumored to contain rogue djinni to power them.
items.name: Seven-League Boots

items.lore: These pure, snow-white leggings are rumored to have been crafted by the legendary ice mage Theorick. The people of Nesaak view them as cursed, seeking to destroy them in a bid to stop the endless winter surrounding them.
items.name: Winter's Essence

items.lore:
Freshly slain foes in well below freezing conditions often provide enough warmth to weather the storm. However, this Corrupted seems to still be alive in some sickening way, draining life force to sustain itself.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Mutilated Corpse

items.lore: In the harshest reaches of the mountains, dusk brings a gentle magic to the air, prolonging the faintest vestiges of sundown before night truly falls.
items.name: Lingering Twilight

items.lore: They look extremely bulky and uncomfortable...do they have a right to call it "enhanced"?
items.name: Enhanced Duskshield

items.lore: Occasional whisperings can be heard by the wearers of this stone mask, reforged from a phylactery of souls. Although not dangerous, staring into the eyes of the mask can bring fear of one's soul being trapped within.
items.name: Pelier

items.lore: This ill-fitting, bulky chestplate was never intended to be a chestplate at all. Rather, it is a broken fragment of an arm bracer, from the time of giants.
items.name: Giant's Bracer

majorIds.Escape Route: +Escape Route: Frenzy and Time Dilation charge twice as fast but also decay twice as fast.

items.lore: To the victor go the spoils. To the swift, go the spoils of the victor.
items.name: The Scavenged

items.lore: The chains comprising the mesh are rusty and old. It looks terrible, especially with the newer metal added on.
items.name: Enhanced Assassin's Hood

items.lore: Many blacksmiths have tried to craft their products in this armor's image, but none so far have been able to capture the brilliance of these Bovemist-blessed greaves.
items.name: Holy Greaves

majorIds.Cavalryman: +Cavalryman: You may cast spells and attack with a -30% damage penalty while on a horse.

majorIds.Juggle: +Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

items.lore: The paintjob on the armor is incredibly garish. Who thinks to combine sea green, mud, hot pink, and neon yellow?
items.name: Enhanced Phosphene

items.lore: "After nearly getting trapped in an iron maiden, I figure I can study  those mummies just as well from home." -Achper, Almuj Archaeologist
items.name: Springtrap

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Nevermore

majorIds.Lunge: +Lunge: Hop and Leap's horizontal velocity is greatly increased.

items.lore: The dense, frostbitten trees hide danger at every step, too far to see yet too close to escape.
items.name: Lurking Peril

items.lore: Supposedly this chestplate belonged to a legendary paladin. The merchant has no explanation for why there are dozens of them.
items.name: Enhanced Zeal

items.lore: Materials of all sorts have been lashed together in this crude, blocky set of leggings. From darksteel to leather to rotting wood, each part is a perfect square. It has, so far, been impossible to recreate.
items.name: Chained Pixels

items.lore: Adding hard metal onto a religious cap seems blasphemous to you. The merchant disagrees.
items.name: Enhanced Salience

items.lore: The accursed mummy once wore this robe as a great pharaoh of the desert. It has long since rotted, leaving only a cursed shell of its former greatness.
items.name: Mummy's Rag

majorIds.Sun Eater: +Sun Eater: Failing to backstab an enemy from behind blinds them for 0.5s and slows them by 20% for 5s.

items.lore: Without your god, whom else is there to turn to but me?
items.name: False Idol

majorIds.Cannulate: +Cannulate: Sacrificial Shrine costs -5 Blood Pool to cast and health drain is halved.

items.lore: Rivers will run red in your wake.
items.name: Phlebotomy

items.lore: Found in a mystically-charged Giant ruin, these snug boots recall fond memories, incite calmness, and provide comfort for the wearer.
items.name: Giant Step

items.lore: The merchant launched into a tirade on how the hardness scale of stones means nothing the instant you saw part of the boots flake off upon being touched.
items.name: Enhanced Gypsum

items.lore: Some of the bones used to make the frame of the boots have crumbled. The merchant refuses to comment.
items.name: Enhanced Skeleton Boots

items.lore:
Ancient bones, fractured by corruption and the elements, have twisted themselves into these leggings. The armor shifts to fit its wearer before turning the bones inwards, inflicting unending agony.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Mesoskeleton

items.lore: Aside from the added plating, they look more or less intact. Somehow, that doesn't surprise you.
items.name: Enhanced Pickpockets

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Ancient Jazerant

items.lore: Apparently, gluing some feathers on top of the decorative armor wings is supposed to allow you to fly- so says the merchant, at least.
items.name: Enhanced Icarus

majorIds.Peaceful Effigy: +Peaceful Effigy: Your Totem will last twice as long.

items.lore: What better excuse is there to sit in the shade and think about life?
items.name: Philosopher

items.lore: "We're trying to dig up history, not horrors! What is wrong with this province?!"  -Excavator Vade, WynnExcavation Site A Director
items.name: Dune Beast Jaw

items.lore: The scratching in the walls is the only warning you get.
items.name: The Swarm

items.lore: The psalm tag has been replaced with a custom message from the armorer. What it says about the original owner is better left to the imagination.
items.name: Enhanced Meditation Robe

items.lore: The merchant insists that the wear and oxidation on the armor "is a feature."
items.name: Enhanced Copper Plate

items.lore: The blind prophet who crafted this macabre breastplate used the bones of only the most ruthless justiciars and executioners. Its wearers are supposedly destined to only die either a heroic or a just death.
items.name: Erratio

items.lore: They look like at once point they may have been fairly upscale. Now they just look like a metallic mess.
items.name: Enhanced Oxford

items.lore: Worn by a terrible berserker during his fanatical rampage through the land, his rage permeates this horned blackiron helmet.
items.name: The Berserker's Helm

items.lore: The only difference you can see is that a tacky logo for Rymek Armoury has been stenciled onto the top.
items.name: Enhanced Umbrella Hat

majorIds.Snowy Steps: +Snowy Steps: Leaves a trail of snow behind you.

items.lore: According to the tag on the heels, these boots leave a trail of snow no matter  where one walks with them.
items.name: Snowtread Boots

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Desert Cyclone

items.lore: Looks like it was hastily repainted to match the colors of the mesa. ...but you can see the original greens and browns underneath.
items.name: Enhanced Hilltop

items.lore: Llevigar's schools of wizardry are notorious for their difficult training regimens. These leg plates, forcing users to balance spellcasting with direct combat, are often cited as the tipping point for successful wizards.
items.name: Alternator

items.lore:
Blood, gore, and bone fragments have congealed to your shoulder with the power of sheer corruption. The longer the mass is attached to you, the more of you it takes when you try to remove it.
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Sanguine Spaulder

items.lore: Found in the middle of the Almuj desert, these greaves slowly engulf everything around it in flames. The heat of the desert sun has seared it heavily, empowering it with the fury of the Sun.
items.name: Dead Sands

items.lore: "Some pigmen snuffle through dirt for things to eat. We dig up that soil to plant our crops in; it's always full of life." -Thomas, Ravine Village Resident
items.name: Mud

items.lore: Even ignoring the numerous scorches all over, these boots hardly look any better.
items.name: Enhanced Coalwalkers

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Giant's Kneecap

majorIds.Festive Spirit: +Festive Spirit: Plays wintery tunes.

items.lore: They added stilts to the leggings, so that they could "live up to the name." The fact you can barely stand in them is neatly avoided when you ask.
items.name: Enhanced Panorama

items.lore: These boots were retrieved from a frozen man, uncovered on an expedition to Mt. Wynn. It is believed that the man had been wandering the world before his death.
items.name: Meanderthal

items.lore: "Strangest thing, it turns out Creepers are incredibly flammable..." -Garull, Cryptid Researcher
items.name: Garoth's Hope

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Bloodied Chaps

items.lore: "With the corruption seemingly tied to the emeralds dug by the Roots, people thought gold was the next best thing, the idiots." -Gerald, Retired Miner
items.name: Gold Digger

items.lore: It once held little meaning, another lilac left unnoticed in the quotidian meadows of yesteryear. Yet just its scent brings forth a deluge of memory, crashing down with the force of a time long past.
items.name: Nostalgia

items.lore: "Time travel cares less about small things like a flapping wing, and more about big things, like becoming your own grandfather." -Martyn, Time Valley Resident
items.name: Butterfly

items.lore: It is cold to the touch until worn. Once donned, it engulfs the wearer in excruciatingly hot flames, but never shall the wearer burn; only their enemies will feel the pain of the fire.
items.name: Little Inferno

items.lore: "With the hot, dry winds from the Roots and the cold, wet winds from Nesaak, these houses rot faster than you can blink." -Viraex, Elkurn Citizen
items.name: Brise

items.lore: This chestplate was originally created as a memorial ornament to the lost lives of Ancient Nemract before being reforged into a powerful piece of armor for Nemract's guard.
items.name: Nemract's Ruin

items.lore: Out of respect and care for the dead, bovemists cloak them in blessed shrouds to aid their spirits in passing. These efforts, however, are not respected by the dead.
items.name: Angel Wing Shroud

items.lore: "The skeletons at Ancient Nemract are rotted! is it even physically possible to rot a bone?" -Laen, Nemract Librarian
items.name: Black Ripper

items.lore: Recovered from a corrupted soldier who wore them, it was found dancing instead of attacking those around it. Even after it was killed, it jostled and jerked around like a dancing puppet.
items.name: Disco

items.lore: There used to be a constant battle between Almuj's thieves over these feather-light, gold-plated boots, until one day they were stolen by an unknown pickpocket and never seen again.
items.name: Almuj's Walker

items.lore: Using an unorthodox method of smithing, these copper leggings are insulated with an extremely conductive blend of liquid to improve electrical discharge.
items.name: Conductor

items.lore: "We get a lot of weirdos coming from Gavel by airship. That plate mail looked unusably ornate!" -Calo, Private Airship Operator
items.name: Dead Samurai's Plate

items.lore: Left to brittle introspection, love unrequited stings the most when it brings down something built to last.
items.name: Coeur Brise

items.lore: Brilliantly golden as the crops from the humble farm, its mere presence fills stomachs and brings comfort, but only to those who are modest and generous.
items.name: Katoa's Warmth

items.lore: "I just need a little more spider silk to finish this vest!" -Lacrona, Detlas Tailor, found eaten by Nivla spiders
items.name: Web Plate

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Brainy Beanie

items.lore: Long strips of chitin discarded from the mother of spiders Arakadicus still contain traces of her wicked powers, but few have survived the attempts to harvest them.
items.name: Arakadicus' Body

items.lore: A centuries-old storm spirit was banished to these tight boots for his destructive actions. His fury empowers those who wear them with the great force of a raging cyclone.
items.name: Cyclo

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Glaring Issue

items.lore: This ancient stone-hewn helmet is blended with the bones of an extinct animal of some kind. It is harder than dragon's hide.
items.name: Neolithic

items.lore: "You should see when the spiders fight over a meal. It looks ridiculous, legs flailing everywhere!" -Captain Enduyn, Ragni Legion 1st Division
items.name: Stingy

items.lore: "...But under no circumstances should you stand directly behind an attacking spider. While not a universal trait, some spiders are capable of ejecting webs from their spinneret, leaving assailants and victims helpless." -Admiral Aegis' Guide To Nivla Threats, Chapter 3
items.name: Abdomen

items.lore: "...Spiders have a weak point in the cephalothorax, essentially the neck. A small target, but it isn't as tough to chop through as the rest of them. ..." -Admiral Aegis' Guide To Nivla Threats, Chapter 3
items.name: Spinneret

items.lore: Nothing stands out about these thin greaves at a glance. But sometimes, when the time is right, a tempestuous power rushes through them: your legs moving as by themselves, and taking leaps that they should never be able to.
items.name: Cloudburst

items.lore: Due to an unfortunate accident where he choked on a lemon, an unremarkable mercenary became a laughing stock. He later managed to shed the title, as he left no one alive who remembered the name.
items.name: Lemon Legs

items.lore: Forgotten long ago, these boots curse the wearer with an endless hunger.
items.name: Hunger

items.lore: "...Most of their vital organs, however, are located in the bulbous abdomen. If you've enough crushing force with your weapon, it may be a quicker alternative for the kill. ..." -Admiral Aegis' Guide To Nivla Threats, Chapter 3
items.name: Cephalothorax

items.lore: Plated with enchanted metals, these magic-warding boots allow faster travel over nearly any solid surface.
items.name: Omnitread Boots

items.lore: The one true Chimera in existence is sought by many, for great stories are told of its gifts to the worthy. One such gift was a simple fur coat, which gave the wearer but a taste of its power.
items.name: Chimaera

items.lore: "...as intimidating as the name sounds, you want your organs to be trapped in this kind of cage." -Excerpt from Human Anatomy For Fools, Cirh Nettan
items.name: Ribcage

items.lore: This helmet was worn long ago by an infamous assassin who plagued Bovemist sites for decades. It was crafted of the still-bloody skin of their most prized and worshiped cows.
items.name: Bovine Killer

items.lore: Made of an uncommonly used fabric called denim, these fashionable leggings exude style and elegance. Surely wearing them would bring you luck?
items.name: Opulenity

items.lore: "I thought aiming for the legs would disable the enemy. Turns out they can drag themselves with their arms just as quick." -Therck, Ragni Soldier 3rd Division
items.name: Knee

items.lore: A powerful mental curse surrounds these boots, inciting uncontrollable rage into the wearers, as well as the power to enact it upon others.
items.name: Audacity

items.lore: This peculiar shawl is eternally warm to the touch, and shimmers brilliantly in the sunlight. It is rumored to give amazing health benefits and good fortune to those who wear it.
items.name: Heliophilia

items.lore: The thick, Bovemist-sanctified cloth is worn by their priests during certain religious ceremonies. It clears the mind and purifies the body.
items.name: Blessed Wrappings

items.lore:
The previous owner seems to have met an untimely fate in the undead hordes outside Ragni. Stained but salvageable... a little corruption never hurt anybody, yet....
It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Guard's Garment

items.lore: Despite being only an impure scrap of the normally sturdy blackiron, these heavy leggings still have extreme defensive capabilities.
items.name: Darkiron Scrap

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "I'm feeling PINE, what about you" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Green Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: Not all who roam may find their way home. Others lose themselves in the world... And find a new way forward.
items.name: Mask of the Spirits

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "YELLOW- How's your Craftmas going" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Yellow Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "All STOCKINGED up for the season" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Beige Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "I'll never give you the COLD SHOULDER" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Red Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "GRAUPELING with a second helping of Craftmas feast" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Indigo Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "SNOW way Craftmas can be bad in this sweater" knitted onto the front.
items.name: White Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "ORANGE you glad I showed up for Craftmas" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Orange Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "SLOPE to SKI you again next Craftmas" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Cerulean Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: I won!
items.name: Contest Wynner Cap

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "Let me NICK a few extra cookies for Craftmas" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Pine Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "Why be merry? CLAUS I said so" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Scarlet Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "YULE see me smiling this season" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Brown Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "Don't feel BLUE- It's Craftmas!" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Blue Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "Prepare for a FLURRY of Craftmas spirit" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Black Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "Going HAM on Craftmas dinner tonight" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Pink Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The sweater has the quote "ICY you looking at my fancy duds" knitted onto the front.
items.name: Purple Wynnter Sweater

items.lore: The shirt has the quote "I went to the Letvus Airbase in Cinfras and all I got was this lousy T-shirt" printed on it.
items.name: Cinfras Souvenir T-Shirt

items.lore: An anomaly of destruction, for the conquerors who seek purpose outside of reality.
items.name: Breakthrough

items.lore: An anomaly of invasion, for the explorers who seek purpose outside of reality.
items.name: Ingress

items.lore: An anomaly of adoption, for the caretakers who seek purpose outside of reality.
items.name: Collection

items.lore: An anomaly of replication, for the assemblers who seek purpose outside of reality.
items.name: Simulacrum

items.lore: Limitless light fills the vast expanse of your mind.  Harness even a fraction of its potential, and you can command a force to shake worlds.
items.name: Thought Energy

items.lore: An anomaly of restriction, for the protectors who seek purpose outside of reality.
items.name: Forbearance

items.lore: An anomaly of separation, for the wanderers who seek purpose outside of reality.
items.name: Detachment

items.lore: And lo, a single bolt did fly, ensured the bird's grace ever lost, and pierced its wings out from the sky, the day you shot the albatross.
items.name: Albatross

items.lore: Rumors circulate of a once-cook from Lutho who managed to achieve the perfect meal. In their final days, they preserved its essence in this necklace, in a hope that someone else would be able to share the experience they had.
items.name: Umami

items.lore: Unspeakable things live within the shadows; waiting so patiently to take others into their ranks. Facsimiles of their existence, painted in inscrutable darkness. Nobody will see. Nobody will know. Nobody will remember.
items.name: Death Grasp

items.lore: This relic has been passed down through the ages, from conman to charlatan to chiseller. It grants an inexplicable sense of candor to your words.
items.name: Swindler's Charm

majorIds.Spectral Memory: +Spectral Memory: Ghostly Trigger lasts until landing, but no longer increases attack speed. Its cooldown is reduced by 33%.

items.lore: Your mind is falling apart, the pieces scattering, your grasp on reality weakening, your soul an empty space. I shall fill it.
items.name: Possession

items.lore: This ring is set with a beautiful, mesmerizing gem. You could look at it for hours. Hours and hours and hours.
items.name: Lost Seconds

items.lore: You need to keep moving. You can't stop here. You can't. You can't breathe. You can't run. You're dying. You can't keep on. You can't. You can't.
items.name: Hypoxia

items.lore: Your flesh is but a weak imitation of power, a flabby welter of gushing blood and brittle bones, stitched together with threads of weak hope. There is only one way through: you must supplement your failing heart.
items.name: Xenotransplantation

majorIds.Find Thyself: +Find Thyself: Masquerade now grants 75 Mana after switching between Masks 3 times.

items.lore: Give yourself to darkness, and in darkness, answers will take shape.
items.name: Black Space

items.lore: The runes carved into this simple gold ring translate into various words meaning power. It amplifies elemental energies in inexplicable ways.
items.name: Intensity

items.lore: "I pray that those who have heeded the wise one’s warning have survived. The canyon must not meet this fate."
items.name: Succession

items.lore: "All of our faith, all of our worship, and we were rewarded with the apocalypse."
items.name: Compliance

items.lore: The jewels in this necklace naturally draw darkness and corruption into its wearer, purifying the land around them at the cost of their own life.
items.name: Planet Healer

items.lore: "The protector will keep us safe even after this! It has to, it must, it—"
items.name: Obstinance

items.lore: "The lucky ones perished in the abyss. It’s only a matter of time before the land picks us survivors off one by one."
items.name: Dispersion

items.lore: The jewel on this ring is found very rarely deep beneath the Light Forest. It has the power to manipulate light itself.
items.name: Prism

items.lore: "The fractures have ground the land to dust, our home to ruin, and our people to nothing."
items.name: Abrasion

items.lore: "The omens, the warnings, they were right there, and we stood by and did nothing."
items.name: Recalcitrance

items.lore: "It's all doomed anyway. If you don't care, nothing can hurt you."
items.name: Ambivalence

items.lore: This medallion marks its wearer as a true champion. It is awarded to those who have put an unnecessary amount of time into attempting the Legendary Challenge.
items.name: Legendary Medallion

items.lore: A symbol of apology. Of pain, never intended but given carelessly. Of good intentions marred by thoughtlessness and overeager optimism. To give one of these icy pearls away is to give away part of yourself,  and to give hope to those you have hurt that they may find peace.
items.name: Kalorite Jewel

items.lore: "The lightest light will never defeat the darkest dark. Only those who understand both can survive."
items.name: Anya's Penumbra

items.lore: The runes carved into this simple gold cuff translate into various words meaning mastery. It amplifies the ability of the wearer in mysterious ways.
items.name: Prowess

items.lore: The runes carved onto the gold beads strung along this simple necklace translate into various words meaning variance. It provides many abilities though unexplainable means.
items.name: Contrast

items.lore: An old Nemract saying is engraved along the metal. "A single toss of the knucklebones can make or break a gambling man."
items.name: Knucklebones

items.lore: Everything that’s fallen down here has a purpose. Or at least, it used to. Being too far removed from said purpose will eventually smother it, but it can always be rekindled... and that’s where you come in.
items.name: The Extinguished

majorIds.Madness: +Madness: Casts a random spell of your class every 3 seconds.

items.lore: Power, but at what cost?
items.name: Pandemonium

items.lore: Sealed away by the Avos of the old days to prevent it from falling into the wrong hands, this necklace was enchanted to strengthen its wearers spiritual link to nature itself.
items.name: Necklace of a Thousand Storms

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] A fallen link from a chainmail hauberk of an older time, this ring fell from a giant taller than a mountain. As it sped through the air and  gained momentum, it traveled so fast that it was battered to a tenth of its size.
items.name: Downfall

items.lore: Infinitesimal specks of matter wane in and out of view among the darkness of this clasp. Even a glance reminds you of what little exists in the expanses of the Void from which the materials of this were scavenged from.
items.name: Span of the Starfield

items.lore: The feel of cool cream. The savory satisfaction of fatty stew. The bittersweetness of chocolate. Luxuries long since lost alongside what once was, tastes and sensations you can't find anymore. It's enough to bring a man to bitter, bitter tears.
items.name: Sweet Memories

items.lore: You can hardly notice some text engraved on this bracelet. Looking closer, the worn-out inscriptions are telling the legends of an ancient hero whom you do not know of.
items.name: Lost Tales

items.lore: You'll fight strong like the tide, the merchant said. Although you notice the built-in device's abilities, you feel space for an upgrade.
items.name: Silver Hydro Bracelet

items.lore: This necklace, decorated with bright jewels, uses advanced nano-technology to boost its users elemental abilities. Though powerful, there are still a few flaws to be fixed.
items.name: Gold Fusion Necklace

items.lore: Despite the size of the large jewel hanging from this necklace, it doesn't feel heavy at all. However, the necklace's mechanisms seem incomplete.
items.name: Silver Steam Necklace

items.lore: Though it's hard to touch the plain, tech-enhanced necklace without experiencing a little shock, its capabilities intrigue you...
items.name: Silver Static Necklace

items.lore: The device forged into this flawless ring draws all heat from its surrounding. Though it almost burns, you can feel your abilites enhance.
items.name: Diamond Solar Ring

items.lore: Desired by many of the countless challengers, this bracelet allows you to sense movements over thousands of meters away. It is decorated with rough yet beautiful jewels.
items.name: Diamond Fiber Bracelet

items.lore: This ultimate version of a necklace was given to less than a handful of adventurers. Once on your neck, you can communicate with the ground below as if you grew roots.
items.name: Diamond Fiber Necklace

items.lore: The painful shock coming from this improved version of the ring is a small price for its power, but it has yet to reach its peak.
items.name: Gold Static Bracelet

items.lore: The heavy shocks coming from this perfected bracelet would be lethal under normal circumstances, but the only thing its wearer senses is the enhancement of power.
items.name: Diamond Static Bracelet

items.lore: You'll fight strong like the tide, the merchant said. Indeed, you begin to notice how your senses sharpen. But is that the limit...?
items.name: Gold Hydro Bracelet

items.lore: Though it's hard to touch the plain, mechanical ring without experiencing a little shock, its capabilities intrigue you...
items.name: Silver Static Ring

items.lore: The device forged into this advanced ring seems to absorb heat. You can feel a warming sensation all over your hand...
items.name: Gold Solar Ring

items.lore: This prototype model of the Steam Ring increases the user's agility in combat. The jewel of the ring is crystal clear.
items.name: Silver Steam Ring

items.lore: An auxiliary power core of the powerful TERA-4M Mining robot line. It controls the robots by giving the bearer a compulsion to break new grounds and progress further without heed.
items.name: Summa

items.lore: You'll move quick like a river, the merchant insisted. Indeed, you begin to notice how your senses sharpen. But is that the limit...?
items.name: Gold Hydro Ring

majorIds.Sun Eater: +Sun Eater: Failing to backstab an enemy from behind blinds them for 0.5s and slows them by 20% for 5s.

items.lore: The sun fears its wings, and so shall your enemies.
items.name: Minokawa's Grasp

items.lore: Users who have worn this early model of the Steam Bracelet have reported that they have felt "one with the wind" while wearing it.
items.name: Silver Steam Bracelet

items.lore: You'll be wise like the sea, the merchant said. Indeed, you begin to notice how your senses sharpen. But is that the limit...?
items.name: Gold Hydro Necklace

items.lore: This mighty ring is the crown jewel amongst elemental rings. Wearing it, your knowledge is no longer limited to a few elements.
items.name: Diamond Fusion Ring

items.lore: The lethal amount of electricity emmited from this often desired necklace fails to kill you, as its pure energy runs through your veins.
items.name: Diamond Static Necklace

items.lore: You'll move quick like a river, the merchant said, and no word was a lie. With this ring on your finger, you could catch a gnat without looking.
items.name: Diamond Hydro Ring

items.lore: The strong shock coming from this advanced version of the ring is a small price for its power, but it has yet to reach its peak.
items.name: Gold Static Ring

items.lore: This crude looking ring utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Though for now, it remains a whispering.
items.name: Silver Fiber Ring

items.lore: The heavy electrical impulses coming from this ring would be lethal under normal circumstances, but the only thing its wearer senses is pure power. A true masterpiece of engineering.
items.name: Diamond Static Ring

items.lore: You'll fight strong like the tide, the merchant said, and no word was a lie. With this bracelet on your arm you could ride a wave with your bare feet.
items.name: Diamond Hydro Bracelet

items.lore: The device forged into this perfected bracelet drains all heat from its surroundings. Though it almost burns, you can feel your power growing
items.name: Diamond Solar Bracelet

items.lore: This improved version of a bracelet utilizes rare electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. You notice a rhythm with each step...
items.name: Gold Fiber Necklace

items.lore: Users of this perfect model of Legendary Island's steam-powered ring have reported feeling weightless in combat. The jewel of the ring is a perfectly clear diamond.
items.name: Diamond Steam Ring

items.lore: This ring, covered in colorful artifical gems, seems to awaken a powerful elemental force in you. Though stronger than the previous model, its true potential stays sealed.
items.name: Gold Fusion Ring

items.lore: This ring, covered in colorful artifical gems, seems to awaken a strong elemental affinity in you. With some improvements to its core, it could become even better...
items.name: Silver Fusion Ring

items.lore: This improved ring utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. You can sense a rhythm with each step...
items.name: Gold Fiber Ring

items.lore: This steam-powered bracelet is sought by many challengers of the Legendary Challenge. They say that they feel as if they're "one with the wind" when wearing it.
items.name: Diamond Steam Bracelet

items.lore: You'll move quick like a river, the merchant said. Although you notice the built-in device's abilities, you feel space for an upgrade.
items.name: Silver Hydro Ring

items.lore: This impressive bracelet is in high demand. Those who have obtained it say that they feel as if they're "one with the wind" when wearing it.
items.name: Gold Steam Bracelet

items.lore: The device forged into this advanced necklace seems to gather heat. You can feel a warming sensation all over your neck...
items.name: Gold Solar Necklace

items.lore: This rough looking bracelet utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. You can feel a rhythm with each step...
items.name: Gold Fiber Bracelet

items.lore: Elementally attuned gemstones are melded together to form the singular marvel found on this pendant. Despite the violent smithing process, the jewel is utterly flawless.
items.name: Stellar

items.lore: The device forged into this improved bracelet seems to gather heat. You can feel a warming sensation all over your arm...
items.name: Gold Solar Bracelet

items.lore: This bracelet, decorated with simple ornaments, uses built-in micro-devices to boost its users elemental abilites. There are many upgrades to be made before it reaches its full potential.
items.name: Silver Fusion Bracelet

items.lore: The device forged into this simple bracelet seems to gather heat. You feel a bit lukewarm when wearing it...
items.name: Silver Solar Bracelet

items.lore: The masterpiece of a necklace gathers all heat from its surrounding. It is fed to its wearer to maximize the strength of attacks.
items.name: Diamond Solar Necklace

items.lore: A single vibrant star sits at the focus of the mirror. Though, faintly, many more sit in the perimeter of the view... perhaps they mean something?
items.name: Stargazing Lens

items.lore: You'll be wise like the sea, the merchant said. Although you notice the built-in device's abilities, you feel space for an upgrade.
items.name: Silver Hydro Necklace

items.lore: This rough looking bracelet utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Though for now, it remains a whispering.
items.name: Silver Fiber Bracelet

items.lore: The strong shock coming from this improved version of the necklace is a small price for its strength, but it has yet to reach its peak.
items.name: Gold Static Necklace

items.lore: This necklace is the pinnacle of steam-powered technology. Despite the size of the large jewel hanging from the necklace, it doesn't feel heavy at all.
items.name: Diamond Steam Necklace

items.lore: The device forged into this simple ring seems to absorb heat. You feel a bit lukewarm when wearing it...
items.name: Silver Solar Ring

items.lore: The device forged into this basic necklace seems to gather heat. You can feel a warm sting when holding it.
items.name: Silver Solar Necklace

items.lore: This crude looking necklace utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Though for now, it remains quiet.
items.name: Silver Fiber Necklace

items.lore: This bracelet opens up its wearers spirit, filling it with pure elemental knowledge. The ornaments decorating it are without peer.
items.name: Diamond Fusion Bracelet

items.lore: You'll be wise like the sea, the merchant said and every word was true. With this necklace equipped, you could hear the ocean whisper.
items.name: Diamond Hydro Necklace

items.lore: This bracelet, decorated with complex ornaments, uses built-in micro-devices to boost its users elemental abilites. Though powerful, there's still a lot to improve.
items.name: Gold Fusion Bracelet

items.lore: While this model of the Steam Ring is far superior to its predecessor, there still lies the capacity for one more upgrade. The jewel of the ring is crystal clear.
items.name: Gold Steam Ring

items.lore: Unlike any other invention this necklace enhances your power and understanding of the elements tenfold. The colorful jewels used are almost dizzying you.
items.name: Diamond Fusion Necklace

items.lore: This necklace, decorated with bright jewels, uses built-in micro-devices to boost its users elemental abilites. There are many upgrades to be made before it reaches its full potential.
items.name: Silver Fusion Necklace

items.lore: Though it's hard to touch the simple, mechanical bracelet without experiencing a little shock, its capabilities intrigue you...
items.name: Silver Static Bracelet

items.lore: The jewel hanging from this necklace is said to be weightless. While still very powerful, its full potential has yet to be achieved.
items.name: Gold Steam Necklace

items.lore: This masterpiece of a ring utilizes powerful electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Wearing it, you can feel a deep connection to the ground below.
items.name: Diamond Fiber Ring

majorIds.Coagulate: +Coagulate: Blood Connection and Eldritch Call's teleports launch you further and higher.

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Esclavage

majorIds.Lunge: +Lunge: Hop and Leap's horizontal velocity is greatly increased.

items.lore: The mangled body found days too late apparently thought this necklace would let them traverse between geysers into the Upper Heights.
items.name: Daredevil

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] Gentle spirits of the wind attract themselves to the brilliant jewels slotted into this ring, bringing peace to its wearers and those around them.
items.name: Kaze

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\] This small, rough-crafted pendant is the only known magic artifact of the Orcs. It incites destructive tendencies within the wearer.
items.name: Shatterglass

items.lore: A lost relic from the Wind Fortress, a mythical stronghold of the Sky Islands that fell into the Void long ago. A small mechanism within the bracelet points towards its place of origin.
items.name: Follow the Wind

items.lore: This bracelet is awarded to participants of the Legendary Challenge. Its modular design allows it to be upgraded in a number of different ways.
items.name: Bronze Basic Bracelet

items.lore: This ring is awarded to participants of the Legendary Challenge. Its modular design allows it to be upgraded in a number of different ways.
items.name: Bronze Basic Ring

items.lore: This necklace is awarded to participants of the Legendary Challenge. Its modular design allows it to be upgraded in a number of different ways.
items.name: Bronze Basic Necklace

majorIds.Self-sufficient: +Self-sufficient: Powder Specials can no longer be charged manually, but accumulate 8% charge every second.

items.lore: This pendant is not much more than a battery on a string, but a curious combination of Avos and electromagic seem to have left it with the ability to charge power from its surroundings on its own.
items.name: Auxetic Capacitor

majorIds.Insoluble: +Insoluble: Dissolution now lasts 2.5 seconds, but grants only 35% resistance.

items.lore: Who would have thought to ever design something as pointlessly contrived and unusable as this? It's infuriating just to think about...
items.name: Abominator

majorIds.Entropy: +Entropy: Meteor's speed is increased by 50%.

items.lore: Despite heavy damage, this memory core recovered from a fallen Despermech remains usable. Sifting through its contents paints a clear yet brutal picture of the destruction the rogue creations have caused.
items.name: Found Footage

items.lore: The cloth wraps produced by the canyon Dojo are just that, merely soft cloth. It is left to the users to apply them skillfully in battle, in whatever way they see fit.
items.name: Jiandan Handwraps

items.lore: Even simply looking at these odd rings gives way to a compulsion to wear two of them, despite all better judgement.
items.name: Black Catalyst

majorIds.Greed: +Greed: Picking up emeralds heals you and nearby players for 8% max health.

items.lore: Found on the corpse of the oldest shopkeeper of the Gavel province, the engraved text reads 'GREED'.
items.name: Old Keeper's Ring

items.lore: Come to terms with your godlike judgment.
items.name: Reckoning

items.lore: Even looking at this pendant strains your eyes. Should it even exist?
items.name: Altum Spatium

items.lore: Your success heralds the beginning of something new.
items.name: Provenance

items.lore: May your triumphs live eternal and never fade.
items.name: Athanasia

items.lore: What you have seen will mark you forever.
items.name: Metamorphosis

items.lore: Revel in the respect you've finally earned.
items.name: Veneration

items.lore: Aldorei charms are often shared and tinkered with by gifted Elves within the commune. Though simple, the stones blessed by elven magic provide soothing energy to the wearer.
items.name: Adder Stone

items.lore: Let their souls sing your chorus of victory.
items.name: Cacophony

items.lore: This strange pendant has been known to dilate time around the wearer, slowing their movements while greatly augmenting their power.
items.name: Tenuto

requirements.quest: Realm of Light V - The Realm of Light

majorIds.Lightweight: +Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: This golden cuff has an odd time dilation effect surrounding it, slowing all movements significantly, but multiplying the force of impact to a significant degree.
items.name: Momentum

items.lore: \[Community Event Winner\]
items.name: Gospel

majorIds.Freerunner: +Freerunner: When your sprint bar is under 30% full, increase your sprint speed by +150%.

items.lore: A recently married man went off to war wearing this wedding ring. Though he perished in battle, his courage and determination empowers all who wear it.
items.name: Martyr

items.lore: An exclusive amulet given to the most honored knights of Wynn. It whistles with an invigorating tune.
